_publications._publicationTitle: Vinblastine/Methotrexate for Debilitating and Progressive Plexiform Neurofibroma in Children and Young Adults with Neurofibromatosis Type 1: A Phase 2 Study.

_contextSnippet: Twenty-five patients were enrolled, but two were unevaluable as they did not receive any protocol therapy after initial enrollment
details: Used for performance status assessment in adult participants as part of study eligibility criteria
